name: upload-token
title: Openinary Upload Signature Helper
author: Openinary
description: Server-side helper that requests a short-lived presigned upload signature from POST /upload/sign using an Openinary API key.
docs: Call signUpload(baseUrl, process.env.OPENINARY_API_KEY, { folder, expiresIn }) from a protected backend route. Never expose your API key to the browser.
